name: ebook-publishing-system
description: Markdown 원고를 입력하면 PDF/DOCX/미리보기/이미지까지 생산하는 전자책 출판 시스템

scripts.build:chapter-assets: npm run build:canvas:chapters && npm run export:png:chapters
scripts.build:marketing-assets: npm run build:html && npm run build:canvas:chapters && npm run export:png:chapters && npm run export:png:preview && npm run build:canvas:preview && npm run export:png:preview-promo
scripts.build:assets: npm run build:canvas && npm run export:png
scripts.build:assets:sparse: npm run build:canvas:sparse && npm run export:png:sparse
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:paged
scripts.build:release:legacy: npm run build:html && npm run build:assets && npm run export:pdf
scripts.test: node test/parser.test.ts && node test/pages.test.ts && node test/components.test.ts && node test/layout.test.ts && node test/html-renderer.test.ts && node test/theme-engine.test.ts && node test/canvas.test.ts && node test/selector.test.ts && node test/book-selector-integration.test.ts && node test/export.test.ts && node test/scripts.test.ts && node test/chapter-canvas.test.ts && node test/multichapter.test.ts && node test/docx.test.ts && node test/image-asset.test.ts && node test/image-prompts.test.ts && node test/front-matter.test.ts && node test/front-matter-apply.test.ts && node test/epub.test.ts && node test/output-isolation.test.ts && node test/chapter-planner.test.ts && node test/body-generator.test.ts && node test/callout.test.ts && node test/divider.test.ts && node test/highlight.test.ts && node test/tag.test.ts && node test/codeblock.test.ts && node test/timeline.test.ts && node test/stats.test.ts && node test/chart.test.ts && node test/donut.test.ts && node test/result-box.test.ts && node test/feature.test.ts && node test/progress.test.ts && node test/stepper.test.ts && node test/timeline-card.test.ts && node test/compare-card.test.ts && node test/alert.test.ts && node test/process.test.ts && node test/rating.test.ts && node test/tags.test.ts && node test/chips.test.ts && node test/tree.test.ts && node test/pagination.test.ts && node test/empty-state.test.ts && node test/search.test.ts && node test/tooltip.test.ts && node test/popover.test.ts && node test/modal.test.ts && node test/drawer.test.ts && node test/skeleton.test.ts && node test/file.test.ts && node test/cover.test.ts && node test/preflight.test.ts && node test/project-fs.test.ts && node test/front-matter-config.test.ts
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:assets && npm run clean:test-output
